name: BLUE CAP  O.N.
summary: Blue Cap AG is a private equity firm specializing in mature, distressed/vulture financing, secondary investing in portfolio company interests, growth financing, recapitalizations, turnarounds, management buyouts as well as buyins in medium sized companies. It considers investments in niche companies of all industry sectors with particular interest in production companies, technology orientated companies including coating technology, adhesive technology, plastics technology, production technology, medical technology, and metal technology. It only invests in Germany with special focus on Southern Germany. The firm typically invests between √Ç¬Ä5 million ($5.66 million) and √Ç¬Ä25 million ($28.30 million) in equity in companies with a sales value between √Ç¬Ä30 million ($33.96 million) and √Ç¬Ä80 million ($90.56 million) and maximum enterprise value of √Ç¬Ä60 million ($67.92 million). It invests through its balance sheet. The firm prefers to take a majority stake in its portfolio companies and has flexible holding periods for its investments. Blue Cap AG was founded in 2006 and is based in Munich, Germany.
